mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.student_id AS studentId, a.teacher_id AS teacherId, a.course_id AS courseId, a.alert_message AS alertMessage, a.is_read AS isRead, a.create_time AS createTime, a.alert_level AS alertLevel, a.risk_score AS riskScore, s.name AS studentName, c.coursename AS courseName FROM homework_alert a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY a.is_read ASC, a.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM homework_alert WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM homework WHERE course_id = #{courseId}) AS totalHomework, COUNT(hr.id) AS submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN hr.is_overdue = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCount, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN hr.total_score END) AS score1, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN hr.total_score END) AS score2, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN hr.total_score END) AS score3 FROM ( SELECT hr2.id, hr2.total_score, hr2.is_overdue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hr2.insert_time DESC) AS rn FROM homeworkrecord hr2 JOIN homework h ON hr2.homework_id = h.id WHERE hr2.yonghu_id = #{studentId} AND h.course_id = #{courseId} ) hr
